name: teamster
description: Teamster workflow orchestration — WMS and observability for solo Codex sessions

interface.shortDescription: WMS tracking and observability for solo sessions
interface.longDescription: Teamster tracks Outcomes and WorkUnits in WMS, attributes token cost to the entity you're working on, and keeps a tag vocabulary and live activity feed current across your solo Codex sessions.
defaultPrompt: Use $teamster-solo to start a WMS-tracked session.
Use $teamster-status to check outcome and work-unit progress.
Use $teamster-tags to refine the tag vocabulary.
